_comment: Project-level MCP server configuration for Claude Code. When a user opens this repo in Claude Code, Claude will prompt to enable these servers. Credentials are pulled from each user's local environment — never committed here.

shopify-dev._purpose: Official Shopify developer MCP — exposes Shopify theme Liquid docs, Admin/Storefront API schemas, and theme validation tools. No credentials required — it is read-only developer documentation.

shopify-admin._purpose: Shopify Admin API access (read/write products, collections, themes). Requires SHOPIFY_STORE_DOMAIN and SHOPIFY_ADMIN_API_ACCESS_TOKEN in your local environment (.env). Install with: npm i -g @shopify/admin-api-mcp  OR  use the dev-mcp package if it includes admin tooling.
shopify-admin._status: SCAFFOLD — user must install the server package and set env vars before enabling.
